note: v392: Reworked the mobile 'More' button. Instead of opening a pop-up sheet, it now swaps the bottom bar in place — tap More to hide the primary tabs (Invoices/Customers/Expenses) and reveal the rest (Statements/Mileage/Time/Budget); the button becomes '‹ Back' to swap back. Home stays pinned in both views. Opening any section auto-shows its group so the active tab is always on the bar. Desktop sidebar still lists everything.
